entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: Ukuhamba Ngesikhathi nge-AI Ukuze Kufundwe Umlando

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Ukuhamba Ngesikhathi nge-AI Ukuze Kufundwe Umlando kuyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Thola iphasiphothi yesikhathi, dlula isexwayiso sokuhamba, bese uhlola umphakathi othile womlando ngesigcawu, imephu, umugqa wesikhathi, abantu, imithetho, impahla, nobufakazi.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: Ukuhamba Ngesikhathi nge-AI Ukuze Kufundwe Umlando: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: AI Tutor for Parents and Families

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts
entries.value: Umqeqeshi Wokubhala we-AI Wama-eseyi, Izindaba, Nemibhalo Ecace Kakhudlwana

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi Wokubhala we-AI Wama-eseyi, Izindaba, Nemibhalo Ecace Kakhudlwana uyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Thuthukisa ama-eseyi, izindaba, ama-imeyili, nezimpikiswano ngempendulo egxilile egcina izwi lakho lingashintshi.

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: impendulo yokubhala nge-AI egcina izwi lakho lingashintshi.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: Yonke imiyalo yokuqala yokufunda nge-AI ye-inspir

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: Zonke izingxoxo zomphakathi zokufunda nge-AI endaweni eyodwa ecacile.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Umlingani wokufunda nge-AI akufanele azenze igunya lomlingo. Akufanele asuse ukungaqiniseki, athathe indawo yothisha, noma aqeqeshe abafundi ukukopisha izimpendulo. Izinhlelo ezingcono kakhulu zithembekile ngemikhawulo futhi zicacile ngomehluko phakathi kosizo nokudlulisela umsebenzi.

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
Analyze a chart from my textbook
Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Phendula umbuzo wokuhlola, zama isinyathelo, phikisa isimangalo, buyekeza uhlaka, noma wakhe amakhadi okukhumbula.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: Phendula umfundi ngqo, bese unikeza izindlela ezimbili ezingaba khona: izisekelo ezilula noma ukuhlola okujulile.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Noma yimiphi imincintiswano, ama-sweepstakes noma ezinye izikhangiso (ngokuhlanganyela, “Promotions”) ezenziwa zitholakale nge-Service zingalawulwa yimithetho ehlukile kule Migomo Yesevisi. entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: I-API, admin, reset, amathuluzi angasese, nezindawo zezingxoxo ezigciniwe zangasese akusikho okuqukethwe komthombo womphakathi.

entries.source: Applied AI learning work before the current AI wave.
entries.value: Umsebenzi wokufunda nge-AI owasebenza ngaphambi kwegagasi lamanje le-AI.

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
Apply the idea to a new example.
Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Ingabe amakhasi ezithameli awomphakathi futhi angafakwa enkombeni?

entries.source: Are private saved user conversations exposed to search?
entries.value: Ingabe izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe zabasebenzisi zivezwe ekusesheni?
Ingabe izingxoxo zezivakashi zomphakathi zingafakwa enkombeni?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Ingabe izihloko zixhunywe kumathuluzi okufunda nge-AI abukhoma?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: Ingabe la makhasi athi i-inspir ithatha indawo yazo zonke izinkundla zokufunda?

entries.source: Are these pages written only for search engines?
entries.value: Ingabe la makhasi abhalelwe izinjini zokusesha kuphela?

entries.source: Are these prompts just for ChatGPT?
Are these real public pages or just app screens?
entries.value: Ingabe lawa amakhasi omphakathi angempela noma yizikrini zohlelo nje?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: Ingabe lokhu kugeleza kwemisebenzi kumahhala ukuzama?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Phikisana nhlangothi zombili futhi ucije ukucabanga

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Art Appreciation Guide iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Hlola imisebenzi yobuciko, izitayela, abaculi, izinqumo ezibonakalayo, nokuthi yini eyenza isithombe sibe namandla.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Art Appreciation Guide: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Art Appreciation Guide nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Buza ngezinhloso, iminqamulajuqu, isikhathi esitholakalayo, nokuzethemba kwamanje.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Buza noma yimuphi umbuzo futhi ufunde ngezincazelo ezicacile, izibonelo, imiyalo elandelayo, kanye nokufundiswa okubekezelayo kwe-AI.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Buza izithameli, isikali, ubungozi, nokuthi ukuthuthukisa kufakwe kanjani.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Cela ku-Code Tutor imodeli yengqondo elula kakhulu, isibonelo esisodwa, nento eyodwa abaqalayo abavame ukuyiqonda kabi.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Buza ngomkhuba wamanje, umkhuba oqondiwe, nenguqulo yansuku zonke elula kakhulu.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Buza imibuzo elandelayo, hlola ukunemba nokuzethemba, lungisa izikhala, bese uzama futhi.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Cela iseluleko esincane, wenze umfundi achaze isinyathelo esilandelayo, bese usebenzisa i-quiz noma ikhadi lokufunda ukuhlola ukuthi umqondo ubambekile yini.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Cela iseluleko, umbuzo, noma ukuhlolwa kwesinyathelo ngaphambi kwempendulo.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Cela iseluleko. Ungaceli impendulo yokugcina okwamanje.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Cela ukuhlolwa kokungaqondi, umbuzo omfushane wokukhumbula, noma isibonelo esinzima. Phendula ngaphambi kokucela i-AI ikulungise.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Cela incazelo elula yomqondo obuthaka kakhulu.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Cela isinyathelo sokuqala esincane kunempendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Cela isihloko, izinga, noma uhlu lwamagama; bese wethula iqoqo elincane.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Cela umsebenzi wobuciko noma isitayela, noma unikeze uhlaka lokubuka.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Cela amagama emisebenzi, izinsuku zokugcina, umzamo, nesimo samanje.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Cela izithameli, inhloso, nesimo sombhalo wokuqala uma kungacacile; bese unikeza impendulo egxilile.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Cela umbhali, isihloko, usuku, umshicileli, i-URL, nosuku lokufinyelela lapho kudingeka.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Cela isikhathi esitholakalayo, imisebenzi okufanele yenziwe, nezinga lamandla.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Cela ukuzibophezela, umlingani noma umongo, imvamisa yokungena, nobufakazi.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Cela umkhakha nobunzima, bese usetha isifinyezo secala nesinqumo sokuqala.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Cela isigameko nokujula, bese uhlukanisa izimbangela zangemuva nezimbangela eziseduze.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Cela usuku lwesivivinyo, isilabhasi, isikhathi esitholakalayo, nokuzethemba ngesihloko ngasinye.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Cela imibuzo emihlanu exuba izincazelo, izibonelo, nezinkinga zokudlulisela ulwazi.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Cela ifomethi, umkhawulo wesikhathi, nezithameli; bese uqala umzuliswano wokuzijwayeza.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Cela inhloso, imikhawulo, nomuzwa ofunekayo; bese unikeza iqoqo lemibono elihlukahlukene.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Cela inhloso, umugqa wesikhathi, imisebenzi, nokuthi yini ebalwa njengenqubekela phambili yangempela.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Cela isikali sokumaka, izisindo, amamaki amanje, nenhloso.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Cela usayizi weqembu, inhloso, ubude besikhathi, nesigqi sokungena.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Cela izeluleko, ukuhlola, nempendulo ngaphambi kokucela impendulo ephelile.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Cela amathiphu, ukuhlola, impendulo, nezinhlelo zokufunda ezigcina ukucabanga kumfundi.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Cela ulimi, inhloso, nekhodi noma iphutha uma kufanelekile.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Cela ulimi, izinga lomfundi, nesimo; bese uqala usesimweni somlingiswa.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Cela okubalulekile okukodwa kokubuyekeza, hhayi ukushintshwa okuphelile.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Cela umsebenzi owodwa omncane ngaphambi kokucela impendulo.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Cela okubalulekile okukodwa kwesakhiwo esikhundleni sokubhala kabusha konke.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Cela amakhadi omqondo owodwa anezeluleko nemigibe ejwayelekile.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Cela umphumela, ubude besikhathi, iziphazamiso, nesimo sokuqala.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Cela indawo noma indikimba, bese uqondisa ngendawo, ubukhulu, nezici ezisemqoka.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Cela izidingo zangaphambili, imodeli elula, izibonelo, nokungaqondi okuvamile.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Cela inhloso yocwaningo, izinga, nemithombo etholakalayo.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Cela indima, izithameli, nesizinda; bese uqhuba umbuzo wokuqala.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Cela impahla yomthombo noma isihloko nobunzima obuqondiwe.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Cela impahla yomthombo, isihloko, nemininingwane eqondiwe uma ingekho.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Cela impendulo ngesakhiwo, ubufakazi, nokucaca kuyilapho ugcina umbhalo wokugcina ungowakho.
